1.0.0.en: Initial release with local LAN control for Tuya-based devices. Includes socket, light, fan, and climate drivers with manual pairing, persistent connections, and fallback polling.
1.0.0.nl: Eerste release met lokale LAN-besturing voor Tuya-apparaten. Bevat stopcontact-, lamp-, ventilator- en klimaatdrivers met handmatige koppeling, persistente verbindingen en fallback-polling.
